zh.lifeSummary: 當John Delves於大約1420年出生時，他的父親John De Delves II45歲，母親Phillippa Mainwaring37歲。他於1439年與Ellen Betley Egerton結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年5月6日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年52歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Delves于大约1420年出生时，他的父亲John De Delves II45岁，母亲Phillippa Mainwaring37岁。他于1439年与Ellen Betley Egerton结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年5月6日在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年52岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Delves was born about 1420, his father, John De Delves II, was 45 and his mother, Phillippa Mainwaring, was 37. He married Ellen Betley Egerton in 1439. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 6 May 1471, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Delves est né environ 1420, son père, John De Delves II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Phillippa Mainwaring, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Betley Egerton en 1439. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1471, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Delves um 1420 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Delves II 45 und seine Mutter Phillippa Mainwaring 37. Er hat 1439 Ellen Betley Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1471 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Delves è nato il circa 1420, il suo padre, John De Delves II, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Phillippa Mainwaring, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Betley Egerton nel 1439. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1471, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Delvesが約1420年に生まれた時，父John De Delves IIは45歳，母Phillippa Mainwaringは37歳であった。1439年にEllen Betley Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年5月6日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで52歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Delves(이)가 대략 1420년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Delves II(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Phillippa Mainwaring(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1439년 Ellen Betley Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 5월 6일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Delves nasceu aproximadamente 1420, seu pai, John De Delves II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Phillippa Mainwaring, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Betley Egerton em 1439. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1471, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Delves родился около 1420 г., его отцу по имени John De Delves II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillippa Mainwaring, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Betley Egerton в 1439 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 6 мая 1471 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Delves nació aproximadamente 1420, su papá, John De Delves II, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Phillippa Mainwaring, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Ellen Betley Egerton en 1439. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1471, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
